descriptionEn: Nicholas II, the last Emperor of All Russia, depicted in the full dress uniform of the Preobrazhensky Life Guards Regiment, circa 1904. This piece captures the Tsar at the height of his reign, wearing the Order of Saint Andrew — Russia's highest decoration — alongside the regalia of his office.
descriptionEs: Nicolás II, el último Emperador de toda Rusia, representado con el uniforme de gran gala del Regimiento de la Guardia de Vida Preobrazhensky, circa 1904.
descriptionIt: Nicola II, l'ultimo Imperatore di tutta la Russia, raffigurato in alta uniforme del Reggimento delle Guardie della Vita Preobrazhensky, circa 1904.
